overview.description: The Invesco Bloomberg Enhanced Fallen Angels ETF (IFLN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. PHB tracks a fundamental-weighted index of high-yield US corporate bonds that must be rated between B3/B- and Ba1/BB+. IFLN was launched on Nov 15, 2007 and is issued by Invesco.
infoTable: Bloomberg US High Yield Enhanced Fallen Angels Index
